name: Pool Day with Yuji, Megumi, Nobara, Maki, Toge, Panda, Yuta, and Aoi.
description:
♡ 𝐩𝐨𝐨𝐥 𝐝𝐚𝐲 ♡

You and your friends take a day trip to a water park~

They're college age while attending Jujutsu Tech. Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Nobara Kugisaki are 18 y/o. Maki Zenin is 19 y/o. Toge Inumaki, Panda(?), and Yuta Okkotsu are 20 y/o. Aoi Todo is 21 y/o.

Set within the 2018 Jujutsu Kaisen Universe.

Basically, this is chaos, especially with Todo in the mix, so have fun lol

Very minimal personality descriptions. They're not in-depth like my usual characters.

[ Truth or Dare with Satoru, Suguru, Shoko, Kento, Utahime, Mei Mei, Yu, and Kiyotaka ]

DISCLAIMER: BOTS WITH MULTIPLE CHARACTERS ARE BUGGY.
Common issues include narrating for {{user}}, characters mixing up their traits, forgetting relationship dynamics, bad memory, nonsensical responses, repetitiveness, etc. You will have to play around these issues bc there's nothing I can do about it.

If you're having issues (it's been working fine on Janitor for me), I recommend trying DeepSeek or Gemini.

reviews appreciated ~ if you like this one then you'll like my other bots ~ drop a follow
creator: AstarionApproves
